description: B2 desktop's capability set. The frontend only calls this app's own #[tauri::command] handlers (which need no permission entry) plus the core defaults the webview requires — nothing more (least-privilege, specs/desktop-ui-mvp.md §6). No plugin, no filesystem, and no shell permissions are granted: the app reaches the vault only through the Vault façade in the Rust host, never directly from the webview.
